title: Apply Patch<T> to ChatUpdateInput nullable fields
description:
Replace in ChatUpdateInput:
  Option<Option<&'a UTCDate>> mute_until -> Patch<&'a UTCDate>
  Option<Option<&'a str>>     description -> Patch<&'a str>
  Option<Option<&'a str>>     avatar_blob_id -> Patch<&'a str>

Update chat_set_update implementation to use Patch::into_json (or equivalent). Update fixture tests.
